visual_analysis.description: A green soda can with 'Sprite' written on it, located on the left side of the shelf.
A red soda can with 'Coca-Cola' written on it, located behind and to the right of the milk can.
A white can with 'Milk' written on it, located in front of the red soda can.

action_plan.explanation: The user requested 'sprite', which is the green soda can. It is clearly visible and unobstructed.
